ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market region */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "sale_amount" TEXT /* Total sale amount in the base currency */,
  "sale_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the sale */,
  "sale_exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate used for conversion */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "net_sale_amount" TEXT /* Net sale amount after discount */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount applied to the sale */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date for which the sales data is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES market_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the market region (e.g., United States, European Union) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the market region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market region */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "region_gdp" TEXT /* GDP of the region */,
  "region_tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applicable in the region */,
  "region_shipping_rates" TEXT /* Average shipping rates in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_regions_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code (e.g., USD, GBP) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency (e.g., United States Dollar, British Pound) */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the currency (e.g., $, £) */,
  "currency_decimal_places" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places used in the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales trend analysis */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market region */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend analysis period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend analysis period */,
  "sales_growth" TEXT /* Growth in sales over the period */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., weekly, monthly, yearly) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_analysis" TEXT /* Detailed analysis of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES market_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market region */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Product identifier */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of product in inventory */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking */,
  "safety_stock" INTEGER /* Safety stock level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was last updated */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last physically checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES market_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product in base currency */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "product_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "product_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "product_supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)
